message:
bd-1f42.2.2: harden tool execution tests with real FS/process behavior

Add 57 hardened tests (tests/tools_hardened.rs) covering edge cases for all
7 built-in tools using real filesystem and process execution:

- read (10): symlinks, deep paths, unicode, MAX_BYTES boundary, offset/limit
- write (7): atomic symlink replacement, nested dirs, unicode, UTF-16 counts
- edit (8): regex metacharacters, multiline, CRLF, unicode, readonly rejection
- bash (10): stderr, exit codes 0/1/127, syntax errors, timeout, pipes, env
- grep (6): regex metacharacters, unicode, path scoping, context lines
- find (5): nested globs, path scoping, empty trees, unicode, limit cap
- ls (7): symlinks, many entries, sort order, trailing slash, unicode
- cross-tool (4): write→grep, write→find, bash→read, edit→ls integration

All tests use TestHarness for temp dirs and diagnostic artifacts. No mocks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
